# @lumiarq/ai

Framework-agnostic AI gateway with provider adapters and model policy support.

## What it does

- Unified completion API across providers
- Provider adapters for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Groq-compatible APIs
- Environment-based provider factory (`createGatewayFromEnv`)
- Deterministic local fallback provider
- Task-based model routing and auto-policy helpers

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/ai
```

## Quick example

```ts
import { complete } from '@lumiarq/ai'

const text = await complete('Suggest 3 package names')
```

## Contributing

1. Add tests for provider selection, model routing, and error handling.
2. Keep adapters dependency-light and runtime-safe for Node 20+.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/ai test typecheck build`.
